title: mentha longifolia subsp. pellita
intro: Mentha longifolia subsp. pellita, also known as woolly mint, is a subspecies of the mint plant, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Mentha longifolia subsp. pellita include reducing inflammation and relieving digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for gastrointestinal problems and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and topical applications, which can be used to soothe skin irritations and promote overall well-being.
